Action.Src: NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Set registry value 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration\GUILogonInstalled' to TRUE" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration\GUILogonInstalled", "REG_SZ", "TRUE"

NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Removing registry value 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration\GUILogonInstalled'" NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegValue "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration\GUILogonInstalled"

Component.Name: SAP GUI Logon Pad Set Variable PreInstall

Action.Src: NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Set registry value 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration\GUILogonPadInstalled' to TRUE" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration\GUILogonPadInstalled", "REG_SZ", "TRUE"

Component.Name: SAP GUI Logon Pad Set Variable PostInstall

Action.Src: NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Removing registry value 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration\GUILogonPadInstalled'" NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegValue "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration\GUILogonPadInstalled"

NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-action: Checking reboot condition." Dim argCollection Set argCollection = NwEngine.DE.CommandLineArguments If argCollection.IsArgumentSupplied("SuppressReboot") Then NwEngine.Context.Reboot = 0 'Setting Flag for no Reboot NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteWarning "Script-action: Reboot suppressed by the user. NwEngine.Context.Reboot = " & NwEngine.Context.Reboot ElseIf argCollection.IsArgumentSupplied("DelayReboot") Then NwEngine.Context.Reboot = 1 'Setting Flag for delayed Reboot NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteWarning "Script-action: Reboot delayed by the user. NwEngine.Context.Reboot = " & NwEngine.Context.Reboot ElseIf argCollection.IsArgumentSupplied("ForceReboot") Then NwEngine.Context.Reboot = 2 'Setting Flag for immediate Reboot NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-action: Enforce immediate reboot." End If

If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist("%SAPSrcDir%\custom\saplogon.ini") Then NwEngine.Shell.CopyFile "%SAPSrcDir%\custom\saplogon.ini", "%WinDir%\saplogon.ini" End If If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist("%SAPSrcDir%\custom\saproute.ini") Then NwEngine.Shell.CopyFile "%SAPSrcDir%\custom\saproute.ini", "%WinDir%\saproute.ini" End If If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist("%SAPSrcDir%\custom\sapmsg.ini") Then NwEngine.Shell.CopyFile "%SAPSrcDir%\custom\sapmsg.ini", "%WinDir%\sapmsg.ini" End If

sapdp00 3200/tcp sapdp01 3201/tcp sapdp02 3202/tcp sapdp03 3203/tcp sapdp04 3204/tcp sapdp05 3205/tcp sapdp06 3206/tcp sapdp07 3207/tcp sapdp08 3208/tcp sapdp09 3209/tcp sapdp10 3210/tcp sapdp11 3211/tcp sapdp12 3212/tcp sapdp13 3213/tcp sapdp14 3214/tcp sapdp15 3215/tcp sapdp16 3216/tcp sapdp17 3217/tcp sapdp18 3218/tcp sapdp19 3219/tcp sapdp20 3220/tcp sapdp21 3221/tcp sapdp22 3222/tcp sapdp23 3223/tcp sapdp24 3224/tcp sapdp25 3225/tcp sapdp26 3226/tcp sapdp27 3227/tcp sapdp28 3228/tcp sapdp29 3229/tcp sapdp30 3230/tcp sapdp31 3231/tcp sapdp32 3232/tcp sapdp33 3233/tcp sapdp34 3234/tcp sapdp35 3235/tcp sapdp36 3236/tcp sapdp37 3237/tcp sapdp38 3238/tcp sapdp39 3239/tcp sapdp40 3240/tcp sapdp41 3241/tcp sapdp42 3242/tcp sapdp43 3243/tcp sapdp44 3244/tcp sapdp45 3245/tcp sapdp46 3246/tcp sapdp47 3247/tcp sapdp48 3248/tcp sapdp49 3249/tcp sapdp50 3250/tcp sapdp51 3251/tcp sapdp52 3252/tcp sapdp53 3253/tcp sapdp54 3254/tcp sapdp55 3255/tcp sapdp56 3256/tcp sapdp57 3257/tcp sapdp58 3258/tcp sapdp59 3259/tcp sapdp60 3260/tcp sapdp61 3261/tcp sapdp62 3262/tcp sapdp63 3263/tcp sapdp64 3264/tcp sapdp65 3265/tcp sapdp66 3266/tcp sapdp67 3267/tcp sapdp68 3268/tcp sapdp69 3269/tcp sapdp70 3270/tcp sapdp71 3271/tcp sapdp72 3272/tcp sapdp73 3273/tcp sapdp74 3274/tcp sapdp75 3275/tcp sapdp76 3276/tcp sapdp77 3277/tcp sapdp78 3278/tcp sapdp79 3279/tcp sapdp80 3280/tcp sapdp81 3281/tcp sapdp82 3282/tcp sapdp83 3283/tcp sapdp84 3284/tcp sapdp85 3285/tcp sapdp86 3286/tcp sapdp87 3287/tcp sapdp88 3288/tcp sapdp89 3289/tcp sapdp90 3290/tcp sapdp91 3291/tcp sapdp92 3292/tcp sapdp93 3293/tcp sapdp94 3294/tcp sapdp95 3295/tcp sapdp96 3296/tcp sapdp97 3297/tcp sapdp98 3298/tcp sapdp99 3299/tcp sapgw00 3300/tcp sapgw01 3301/tcp sapgw02 3302/tcp sapgw03 3303/tcp sapgw04 3304/tcp sapgw05 3305/tcp sapgw06 3306/tcp sapgw07 3307/tcp sapgw08 3308/tcp sapgw09 3309/tcp sapgw10 3310/tcp sapgw11 3311/tcp sapgw12 3312/tcp sapgw13 3313/tcp sapgw14 3314/tcp sapgw15 3315/tcp sapgw16 3316/tcp sapgw17 3317/tcp sapgw18 3318/tcp sapgw19 3319/tcp sapgw20 3320/tcp sapgw21 3321/tcp sapgw22 3322/tcp sapgw23 3323/tcp sapgw24 3324/tcp sapgw25 3325/tcp sapgw26 3326/tcp sapgw27 3327/tcp sapgw28 3328/tcp sapgw29 3329/tcp sapgw30 3330/tcp sapgw31 3331/tcp sapgw32 3332/tcp sapgw33 3333/tcp sapgw34 3334/tcp sapgw35 3335/tcp sapgw36 3336/tcp sapgw37 3337/tcp sapgw38 3338/tcp sapgw39 3339/tcp sapgw40 3340/tcp sapgw41 3341/tcp sapgw42 3342/tcp sapgw43 3343/tcp sapgw44 3344/tcp sapgw45 3345/tcp sapgw46 3346/tcp sapgw47 3347/tcp sapgw48 3348/tcp sapgw49 3349/tcp sapgw50 3350/tcp sapgw51 3351/tcp sapgw52 3352/tcp sapgw53 3353/tcp sapgw54 3354/tcp sapgw55 3355/tcp sapgw56 3356/tcp sapgw57 3357/tcp sapgw58 3358/tcp sapgw59 3359/tcp sapgw60 3360/tcp sapgw61 3361/tcp sapgw62 3362/tcp sapgw63 3363/tcp sapgw64 3364/tcp sapgw65 3365/tcp sapgw66 3366/tcp sapgw67 3367/tcp sapgw68 3368/tcp sapgw69 3369/tcp sapgw70 3370/tcp sapgw71 3371/tcp sapgw72 3372/tcp sapgw73 3373/tcp sapgw74 3374/tcp sapgw75 3375/tcp sapgw76 3376/tcp sapgw77 3377/tcp sapgw78 3378/tcp sapgw79 3379/tcp sapgw80 3380/tcp sapgw81 3381/tcp sapgw82 3382/tcp sapgw83 3383/tcp sapgw84 3384/tcp sapgw85 3385/tcp sapgw86 3386/tcp sapgw87 3387/tcp sapgw88 3388/tcp sapgw89 3389/tcp sapgw90 3390/tcp sapgw91 3391/tcp sapgw92 3392/tcp sapgw93 3393/tcp sapgw94 3394/tcp sapgw95 3395/tcp sapgw96 3396/tcp sapgw97 3397/tcp sapgw98 3398/tcp sapgw99 3399/tcp

NwEngine.Shell.Use64BitHive = vbFalse If NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon") Then dwShowShortcutTab = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue( "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon\ShowShortcutTab" ) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: dwShowShortcutTab = " & dwShowShortcutTab If dwShowShortcutTab = "1" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Key 'ShowShortcutTab' contains the default value already." Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Key 'ShowShortcutTab' contains a customized value, leaving existing key untouched!" End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Key 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon' does not exist and should be created." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon\ShowShortcutTab", "REG_DWORD", "1" End If

NwEngine.Shell.Use64BitHive = vbFalse If NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon") Then dwShowShortcutTab = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue( "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon\ShowShortcutTab" ) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: dwShowShortcutTab = " & dwShowShortcutTab If dwShowShortcutTab = "1" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Key contains the default value, existing 'ShowShortcutTab' key should be deleted!" NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegValue( "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon\ShowShortcutTab" ) NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegKey( "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon" ) Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Key contains a customized value, leaving existing 'ShowShortcutTab' key untouched!" End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Key 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon' does not exist." End If

NwEngine.Shell.Use64BitHive = vbFalse If NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI") Then dwStartSapLogon = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue( "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI\StartSapLogon" ) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: dwStartSapLogon = " & dwStartSapLogon If dwStartSapLogon = "1" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Key 'StartSapLogon' contains the default value already." Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Key 'StartSapLogon' contains a customized value, leaving existing key untouched!" End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Key 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI\StartSapLogon' does not exist and should be created." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI\StartSapLogon", "REG_DWORD", "1" End If

NwEngine.Shell.Use64BitHive = vbFalse If NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI") Then dwStartSapLogon = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue( "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI\StartSapLogon" ) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: dwStartSapLogon = " & dwStartSapLogon If dwStartSapLogon = "1" Or dwStartSapLogon = "" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Key contains the default value or is empty, existing 'StartSapLogon' key should be deleted!" NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegValue( "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI\StartSapLogon" ) NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegKey( "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI" ) Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Key contains a customized value, leaving existing 'StartSapLogon' key untouched!" End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Key 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI' does not exist." End If

NwEngine.Context.Log.Write("Search for obsolete 'FewUi*.txt' files to remove.") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\Lang\FewUiAR.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiBG.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiCA.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiCS.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiDA.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiDE.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiEL.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiEN.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiES.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiFI.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiFR.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiHE.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiHR.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiHU.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiIT.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiJA.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiKO.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiNL.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiNO.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiPL.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiPT.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiRO.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiRU.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiSH.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiSK.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiSL.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiSV.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiTH.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiTR.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiUK.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiZF.txt") RemoveObsoleteFile("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\lang\FewUiZH.txt") Function RemoveObsoleteFile( strFilename ) If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( strFilename ) Then NwEngine.Shell.DeleteFile strFilename End If End Function

NwEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "bOverWriteSAPGUIControlPlugin", "True" If NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKLM\Software\SAP\General") Then dwSAPGUIControlPlugin = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue( "HKLM\Software\SAP\General\SAPGUIControlPlugin" ) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "dwSAPGUIControlPlugin = " & dwSAPGUIControlPlugin If dwSAPGUIControlPlugin <> "" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Do not override existing 'SAPGUIControlPlugin' key!" NwEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "bOverWriteSAPGUIControlPlugin", "False" End If End If NwEngine.Variables.Persistent("bOverWriteSAPGUIControlPlugin") = vbFalse

NwEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "bOverWriteBranding", "False" If Not NwEngine.Shell.RegValueExist("HKLM\Software\SAP\General\Appearance\BrandingImage_ReadOnly") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Value 'BrandingImage_ReadOnly' does not exist yet and is going to be written." NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "bOverWriteBranding", "True" Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Do not override existing 'bOverWriteBranding' value!" End If NwEngine.Variables.Persistent("bOverWriteBranding") = vbFalse
NwEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "bOverWriteUseBranding", "False" If Not NwEngine.Shell.RegValueExist("HKLM\Software\SAP\General\Appearance\UseBrandingImage_ReadOnly") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Value 'UseBrandingImage_ReadOnly' does not exist yet and is going to be written." NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "bOverWriteUseBranding", "True" Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: Do not override existing 'bOverWriteUseBranding' value!" End If NwEngine.Variables.Persistent("bOverWriteUseBranding") = vbFalse

NwEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "szIEMajorVersion", "UNDEFINED" If NwEngine.Shell.RegValueExist("HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\svcVersion") Then szIEVersion = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue ("HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\svcVersion") NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Internet Explorer Version: " & szIEVersion szIEMajorVersion = Left (szIEVersion, InStr(1, szIEVersion, ".") - 1) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Internet Explorer Major Version: " & szIEMajorVersion NwEngine.Variables.Persistent("szIEMajorVersion") = vbFalse intIEMajorVersion = CInt ( szIEMajorVersion ) ElseIf NwEngine.Shell.RegValueExist("HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\Version") Then szIEVersion = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue ("HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\Version") NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Internet Explorer Version: " & szIEVersion szIEMajorVersion = Left (szIEVersion, InStr(1, szIEVersion, ".") - 1) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Internet Explorer Major Version: " & szIEMajorVersion NwEngine.Variables.Persistent("szIEMajorVersion") = vbFalse intIEMajorVersion = CInt ( szIEMajorVersion ) Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Neither registry key HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\svcVersion nor Version does not exist!" End If
If ( szIEMajorVersion <> "UNDEFINED" ) Then szSapLogonFCKey = "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\MAIN\FeatureControl\FEATURE_BROWSER_EMULATION\SAPLOGON.exe" szSapLgPadFCKey = "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\MAIN\FeatureControl\FEATURE_BROWSER_EMULATION\SAPLGPAD.exe" If ( intIEMajorVersion = 6 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "No keys are going to be written for IE6." ElseIf ( intIEMajorVersion = 7 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Writing keys for IE7." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLogonFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "8000" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLgPadFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "8000" ElseIf ( intIEMajorVersion = 8 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Writing keys for IE8." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLogonFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "8000" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLgPadFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "8000" ElseIf ( intIEMajorVersion = 9 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Writing keys for IE9." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLogonFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "9000" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLgPadFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "9000" ElseIf ( intIEMajorVersion = 10 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Writing keys for IE10." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLogonFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "10000" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLgPadFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "10000" ElseIf ( intIEMajorVersion = 11 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Writing keys for IE11." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLogonFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "11001" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLgPadFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "11001" Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Internet Explorer Major Release not supported!!!" End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Internet Explorer not found!!!" End If

NwEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "szIEMajorVersion", "UNDEFINED" If NwEngine.Shell.RegValueExist("HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\svcVersion") Then szIEVersion = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue ("HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\svcVersion") NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Internet Explorer Version: " & szIEVersion szIEMajorVersion = Left (szIEVersion, InStr(1, szIEVersion, ".") - 1) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Internet Explorer Major Version: " & szIEMajorVersion NwEngine.Variables.Persistent("szIEMajorVersion") = vbFalse intIEMajorVersion = CInt ( szIEMajorVersion ) ElseIf NwEngine.Shell.RegValueExist("HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\Version") Then szIEVersion = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue ("HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\Version") NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Internet Explorer Version: " & szIEVersion szIEMajorVersion = Left (szIEVersion, InStr(1, szIEVersion, ".") - 1) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Internet Explorer Major Version: " & szIEMajorVersion NwEngine.Variables.Persistent("szIEMajorVersion") = vbFalse intIEMajorVersion = CInt ( szIEMajorVersion ) Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Neither registry key HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\svcVersion nor Version does not exist!" End If
If ( szIEMajorVersion <> "UNDEFINED" ) Then szSapLogonFCKey = "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\MAIN\FeatureControl\FEATURE_BROWSER_EMULATION\SAPLOGON.exe" szSapLgPadFCKey = "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\MAIN\FeatureControl\FEATURE_BROWSER_EMULATION\SAPLGPAD.exe" If ( intIEMajorVersion = 6 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "No keys are going to be written for IE6." ElseIf ( intIEMajorVersion = 7 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Writing keys for IE7." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLogonFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "8000" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLgPadFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "8000" ElseIf ( intIEMajorVersion = 8 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Writing keys for IE8." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLogonFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "8000" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLgPadFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "8000" ElseIf ( intIEMajorVersion = 9 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Writing keys for IE9." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLogonFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "9000" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLgPadFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "9000" ElseIf ( intIEMajorVersion = 10 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Writing keys for IE10." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLogonFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "10000" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLgPadFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "10000" ElseIf ( intIEMajorVersion = 11 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Writing keys for IE11." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLogonFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "11001" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue szSapLgPadFCKey, "REG_DWORD", "11001" Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Internet Explorer Major Release not supported!!!" End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Internet Explorer not found!!!" End If

szSapLogonFCKey = "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\MAIN\FeatureControl\FEATURE_BROWSER_EMULATION\SAPLOGON.exe" szSapLgPadFCKey = "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\MAIN\FeatureControl\FEATURE_BROWSER_EMULATION\SAPLGPAD.exe" NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegValue szSapLogonFCKey NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegValue szSapLgPadFCKey

szSapGuiPatchLevel = NwEngine.Variables.GetValue("SapGuiPatchLevel") NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-action: Variable SapGuiPatchLevel has the value <" & szSapGuiPatchLevel & ">" If szSapGuiPatchLevel <> "" And szSapGuiPatchLevel <> "0" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-action: Checking Variable SapGuiPatchLevel: Patch found." If szSapGuiPatchLevel = "Beta" Then szGuiPatchLevelText = "Beta" Else szGuiPatchLevelText = " (Patch " & szSapGuiPatchLevel & ")" End If NWEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "GuiPatchLevel", szGuiPatchLevelText Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-action: Checking Variable SapGuiPatchLevel: No Patch found." NWEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "GuiPatchLevel", "" End If
NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: From 7.20: Component JNet Control obsolete. File sapmsgforward.ocx moved to CoreGUI Files."

conKeyDacl = 0 conKeyOwner = 1 conAccessRead = &H80000000 conAccessAll = &H10000000 conUsersGrpSid = NwEngine.Shell.GetWellKnownSid (4) conAdminGrpSid = NwEngine.Shell.GetWellKnownSid (8) conSystemSid = NwEngine.Shell.GetWellKnownSid (10) Dim ACEs(3) ACEs(0) = NwEngine.Shell.CreateAce (conUsersGrpSid, conAccessRead, vbTrue) ACEs(1) = NwEngine.Shell.CreateAce (conAdminGrpSid, conAccessAll, vbTrue) ACEs(2) = NwEngine.Shell.CreateAce (conSystemSid, conAccessAll, vbTrue) strKeyAcl = NwEngine.Shell.CreateAcl (ACEs) NwEngine.Shell.SetNamedObjectSecurity "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend Server\Security", conKeyDacl, strKeyAcl, vbFalse NwEngine.Shell.SetNamedObjectSecurity "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend Server\Security", conKeyOwner, conAdminGrpSid, vbFalse

If NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKCU\Software\SAP\General\Appearance\Themes\Complementary") Then NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegKey "HKCU\Software\SAP\General\Appearance" End If If NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\General\Appearance\Themes\Complementary") Then NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegKey "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\General\Appearance" End If
NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "The SAP GUI Uninstall Keys have been moved to component $CoreGUI Files!"

strSapLogonExeManifest = NWEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%SapFrontEndDir%\SAPgui\saplogon.exe.manifest") If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( strSapLogonExeManifest ) Then NwEngine.Shell.DeleteFile strSapLogonExeManifest End If

Component.Name: $SAP Logon Desktop Icons and Start Menu Entries

Action.Src: NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-Action: From 7.20 C1: Component SAP Logon Kit is emptied - all files moved to component Core GUI!"

If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist("%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\saplogon.exe") Then NWEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "ExistSapLogon", "True" Else NWEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "ExistSapLogon", "False" End If

Component.Name: $SAP Logon Pad Desktop Icons and Start Menu Entries

Action.Src: If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist("%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\saplogon.exe") Then NWEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "ExistSapLogon", "True" Else NWEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "ExistSapLogon", "False" End If

NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script Action: Dealing with SetSapWorkDir." lastIndex = NwEngine.Variables.GetTotalNumValues( "SetSapWorkDir" )-1 for i = 0 to lastIndex NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SetSapWorkDir Value Number " & i & ": " & NwEngine.Variables.GetNthValue( "SetSapWorkDir", i) Next
If (lastIndex = 2) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "The client machine already has a variable named SetSapWorkDir."
SetSapWorkDirClient = NwEngine.Variables.GetNthValue( "SetSapWorkDir", 0) SetSapWorkDirInit = NwEngine.Variables.GetNthValue( "SetSapWorkDir", 1) SetSapWorkDirPackage = NwEngine.Variables.GetNthValue( "SetSapWorkDir", 2) 'LcSetSapWorkDir = LCase(SetSapWorkDirPackage) LcSetSapWorkDir = NWEngine.Variables.ResolveString(SetSapWorkDirPackage)
NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SetSapWorkDirInit Value: " & SetSapWorkDirInit NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SetSapWorkDirClient Value: " & SetSapWorkDirClient NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SetSapWorkDirPackage Value: " & SetSapWorkDirPackage
SetSapWorkDirInit = Replace (SetSapWorkDirInit, Chr(37), Chr(37) & Chr(37), 1, -1, 1) SetSapWorkDirClient = Replace (SetSapWorkDirClient, Chr(37), Chr(37) & Chr(37), 1, -1, 1) SetSapWorkDirPackage = Replace (SetSapWorkDirPackage, Chr(37), Chr(37) & Chr(37), 1, -1, 1)
NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SetSapWorkDirInit Value Replaced: " & SetSapWorkDirInit NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SetSapWorkDirClient Value Replaced: " & SetSapWorkDirClient NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SetSapWorkDirPackage Value Replaced: " & SetSapWorkDirPackage
End If
If (lastIndex = 1) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "The client machine doesn't have a variable named SetSapWorkDir yet."
SetSapWorkDirPackage = NwEngine.Variables.GetNthValue( "SetSapWorkDir", 0) SetSapWorkDirInit = NwEngine.Variables.GetNthValue( "SetSapWorkDir", 1) 'LcSetSapWorkDir = LCase(SetSapWorkDirPackage) LcSetSapWorkDir = NWEngine.Variables.ResolveString(SetSapWorkDirPackage)
NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SetSapWorkDirInit Value: " & SetSapWorkDirInit NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SetSapWorkDirPackage Value: " & SetSapWorkDirPackage
SetSapWorkDirInit = Replace (SetSapWorkDirInit, Chr(37), Chr(37) & Chr(37), 1, -1, 1) SetSapWorkDirPackage = Replace (SetSapWorkDirPackage, Chr(37), Chr(37) & Chr(37), 1, -1, 1)
NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SetSapWorkDirInit Value Replaced: " & SetSapWorkDirInit NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SetSapWorkDirPackage Value Replaced: " & SetSapWorkDirPackage
End If
NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "LcSetSapWorkDir Value: " & LcSetSapWorkDir
If ( SetSapWorkDirPackage <> "" ) Then NwEngine.Variables.LockVariable( "SetSapWorkDir" ) = vbFalse NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SetSapWorkDir", SetSapWorkDirPackage NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SetSapWorkDir Value: " & NwEngine.Variables.GetValue ( "SetSapWorkDir" ) End If

If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi.ini" ) Then NwEngine.Shell.CopyFile "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi.ini", "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi.ini.bak" End If If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwilabel.ini" ) Then NwEngine.Shell.CopyFile "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwilabel.ini", "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwilabel.ini.bak" End If If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi_user.lbl" ) Then NwEngine.Shell.CopyFile "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi_user.lbl", "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi_user.lbl.bak" End If If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi_all.lbl" ) Then NwEngine.Shell.CopyFile "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi_all.lbl", "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi_all.lbl.bak" End If

If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi.ini.bak" ) Then NwEngine.Shell.DeleteFile "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi.ini.bak" End If If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwilabel.ini.bak" ) Then NwEngine.Shell.DeleteFile "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwilabel.ini.bak" End If If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi_user.lbl.bak" ) Then NwEngine.Shell.DeleteFile "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi_user.lbl.bak" End If If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi_all.lbl.bak" ) Then NwEngine.Shell.DeleteFile "%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi_all.lbl.bak" End If

If NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegKey ("HKCR\WWIDOCUMENT\InstallDir") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "WWI Client InstallDir deleted." Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Failure: WWI Server InstallDir not deleted." End If

dim TV1winword TV1winword = "" If NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKCR\Word.Document.8\shell\open\command") Then TV1winword = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue( "HKCR\Word.Document.8\shell\open\command\" ) TV1winword = Replace (TV1winword, Chr(37), Chr(37) & Chr(37), 1, -1, 1) End If If TV1winword = "" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteWarning "Path to WinWord.Exe could not be read from HKCR\Word.Document.8\shell\open\command : default !" End If NWEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "WinWordExe", TV1winword

strDdeexec = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue( "HKCR\WWIDOCUMENT\shell\open\ddeexec\" ) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Var strDdeexec: " & strDdeexec If ( Len(strDdeexec) < 23 ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Regkey ddexec broken! It has to be fixed." NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue "HKCR\WWIDOCUMENT\shell\open\ddeexec", "REG_SZ", "[FileOpen("%%1")][FileTemplates Template:="%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi\wwi.dot"][wwiES.S("%%2", "%%3")]" Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Regkey ddexec intact." End If

WwiServerInstallLocation = "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\{F7A2F668-BFCE-4435-80B8-B7B0AA7A2CF1}\InstallLocation" strWWIServerDestDir = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue(WwiServerInstallLocation) strWWIClientDestDir = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%SapFrontEndDir%\sapgui\wwi") If NwEngine.Shell.RegValueExist(WwiServerInstallLocation) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "WWI Server is installed to " & strWWIServerDestDir & ". Repairing its InstallDir..." If NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue ("HKCR\WWIDOCUMENT\InstallDir\", "REG_SZ", strWWIServerDestDir ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Success: WWI Server InstallDir repaired. Running wwiexe32.exe for fixing the remaining server keys..." szWWIRegCmdLine = strWWIClientDestDir & "\wwiexe32.exe" NwEngine.Shell.Execute szWWIRegCmdLine, bNoWaiting Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Failure: WWI Server InstallDir not repaired." End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "WWI Server is not installed. Setting Client InstallDir..." If NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue ("HKCR\WWIDOCUMENT\InstallDir\", "REG_SZ", strWWIClientDestDir ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Success: WWI Client InstallDir repaired." Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Failure: WWI Client InstallDir not repaired." End If End If

strBexWadExeOnClient = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%SapBiDestDir%\BI\BExWebApplicationDesigner.exe") If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( strBexWadExeOnClient ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "File exists: " & strBexWadExeOnClient NWEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "bIsBexWadInstalled", "True" Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "File not installed: " & strBexWadExeOnClient NWEngine.Variables.InsertVariable "bIsBexWadInstalled", "False" End If NwEngine.Variables.Persistent("bIsBexWadInstalled") = vbFalse

Action.Description: Business Explorer Web Application Designer - Can Only Be Used in SAP NetWeaver NewYork

Action.Src: NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-action: Checking ATL registration sanity." szATLTypeLib = NWEngine.Shell.GetRegValue("HKCR\Interface\{B6EA2051-048A-11D1-82B9-00C04FB9942E}\TypeLib") NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-action: HKCR\Interface\{B6EA2051-048A-11D1-82B9-00C04FB9942E}\TypeLib contains the value: " & szATLTypeLib If Not szATLTypeLib = "{44EC0535-400F-11D0-9DCD-00A0C90391D3}" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-action: ATL registration is broken and needs to be repaired." szATLRegCmdLine = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%SAPSetupDir%\setup\sapregsv.exe /s %WinSysDir32%\atl.dll") NwEngine.Shell.Execute szATLRegCmdLine, bNoWaiting Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script-action: ATL registration is OK, no action required." End If

option explicit dim szSystemDrive, szProgramDataFolder, szProgramDataFolderResolved dim szCommonPrograms, szCommonProgramsResolved, szStartMenuSubFolder szSystemDrive = NWEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%%SystemDrive%%") ' NwEngine.Context.Log.Write 'szSystemDrive = ' & Chr(34) & szSystemDrive & Chr(34) szProgramDataFolder = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue("HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ProfileList\ProgramData") ' NwEngine.Context.Log.Write 'szProgramDataFolder = ' & Chr(34) & szProgramDataFolder & Chr(34) szProgramDataFolderResolved = Replace( szProgramDataFolder, "%%%SystemDrive%%%", szSystemDrive ) ' NwEngine.Context.Log.Write 'szProgramDataFolderResolved = ' & Chr(34) & szProgramDataFolderResolved & Chr(34) szCommonPrograms = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue( "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\User Shell Folders\Common Programs" ) szCommonProgramsResolved = Replace( szCommonPrograms, "%%%ProgramData%%%", szProgramDataFolderResolved ) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Start-menu common programs = " & Chr(34) & szCommonProgramsResolved & Chr(34) szStartMenuSubFolder = szCommonProgramsResolved & "\SAP Front End" NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Running extra clean-up on Vista: " & Chr(34) & szStartMenuSubFolder & Chr(34) If NwEngine.Shell.DirectoryExist( szStartMenuSubFolder ) Then NwEngine.Shell.DeleteDirectory szStartMenuSubFolder End If

BrandingImageInput = NwEngine.Variables.GetUnresolvedValue("SapGui.BrandingImage.Internal") strRegValue = "HKLM\Software\SAP\General\Appearance\BrandingImage" BrandingImagePackage = NwEngine.Variables.GetUnresolvedValue("SapGui.BrandingImage") BrandingImageRegistry = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue(strRegValue) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "BrandingImagePackage: " & BrandingImagePackage NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "BrandingImageInput: " & BrandingImageInput NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "strRegValue: " & strRegValue NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "BrandingImageRegistry: " & BrandingImageRegistry If (Not LCase(BrandingImagePackage) = "none" AND Not LCase(BrandingImagePackage) = "") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Condition: Case 1" BrandingImageInput = BrandingImagePackage NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapGui.BrandingImage.Internal", BrandingImageInput Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Condition: Case 2" NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "BrandingImageRegistry: " & BrandingImageRegistry If Not BrandingImageRegistry = "" Then BrandingImageInput = BrandingImageRegistry NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapGui.BrandingImage.Internal", BrandingImageInput End If End If NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: User input for SapGui.BrandingImage is: " & BrandingImageInput BrandingImageInputLC = LCase(BrandingImageInput) BrandingImageResolved = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString(BrandingImageInput) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Resolved path for SapGui.BrandingImage is: " & BrandingImageResolved If BrandingImageInputLC = "none" OR BrandingImageInputLC = "" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Removing registry value " & strRegValue & " if it exists because SapGui.BrandingImage is set to NONE or empty." If NwEngine.Shell.RegValueExist(strRegValue) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Registry value " & strRegValue & " exists, deleting..." If NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegValue(strRegValue) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Successfully deleted registry value " & strRegValue & "." Else NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteError "Variable-Script-Action: Could not delete registry value " & strRegValue & "." End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Registry value " & strRegValue & " doesn't exist, skipping..." End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: SapGui.BrandingImage is not NONE. The key should not be deleted. Writing user input to the registry..." If NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue(strRegValue, "REG_SZ", BrandingImageResolved) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Registry value " & strRegValue & " set successfully to " & BrandingImageResolved & "." Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Failed to set registry value " & strRegValue & " to " & BrandingImageResolved & "." End If End If

ConfigFileOnServerInput = NwEngine.Variables.GetUnresolvedValue("SapGui.ConfigFileOnServer.Internal") strRegValue = "HKLM\Software\SAP\SAPLogon\Options\ConfigFileOnServer" ConfigFileOnServerPackage = NwEngine.Variables.GetUnresolvedValue("SapGui.ConfigFileOnServer") ConfigFileOnServerRegistry = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue(strRegValue) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "ConfigFileOnServerPackage: " & ConfigFileOnServerPackage NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "ConfigFileOnServerInput: " & ConfigFileOnServerInput NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "strRegValue: " & strRegValue NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "ConfigFileOnServerRegistry: " & ConfigFileOnServerRegistry If (Not LCase(ConfigFileOnServerPackage) = "none" AND Not LCase(ConfigFileOnServerPackage) = "") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Condition: Case 1" ConfigFileOnServerInput = ConfigFileOnServerPackage NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapGui.ConfigFileOnServer.Internal", ConfigFileOnServerInput Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Condition: Case 2" NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "ConfigFileOnServerRegistry: " & ConfigFileOnServerRegistry If Not ConfigFileOnServerRegistry = "" Then ConfigFileOnServerInput = ConfigFileOnServerRegistry NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapGui.ConfigFileOnServer.Internal", ConfigFileOnServerInput End If End If NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: User input for SapGui.ConfigFileOnServer is: " & ConfigFileOnServerInput ConfigFileOnServerInputLC = LCase(ConfigFileOnServerInput) strRegValue = "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon\Options\ConfigFileOnServer" If ConfigFileOnServerInputLC = "none" OR ConfigFileOnServerInputLC = "" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Removing registry value " & strRegValue & " if it exists because SapGui.ConfigFileOnServer is set to NONE or empty." If NwEngine.Shell.RegValueExist(strRegValue) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Registry value " & strRegValue & " exists, deleting..." If NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegValue(strRegValue) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Successfully deleted registry value " & strRegValue & "." Else NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteError "Variable-Script-Action: Could not delete registry value " & strRegValue & "." End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Registry value " & strRegValue & " doesn't exist, skipping..." End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: SapGui.ConfigFileOnServer is not NONE. The key should not be deleted. Writing user input to the registry..." If NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue(strRegValue, "REG_EXPAND_SZ", ConfigFileOnServerInput) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Registry value " & strRegValue & " set successfully to " & ConfigFileOnServerInput & "." Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Failed to set registry value " & strRegValue & " to " & ConfigFileOnServerInput & "." End If End If

LandscapeFileOnServerInput = NwEngine.Variables.GetUnresolvedValue("SapGui.LandscapeFileOnServer.Internal") strRegValue = "HKLM\Software\SAP\SAPLogon\Options\LandscapeFileOnServer" LandscapeFileOnServerPackage = NwEngine.Variables.GetUnresolvedValue("SapGui.LandscapeFileOnServer") LandscapeFileOnServerRegistry = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue(strRegValue) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "LandscapeFileOnServerPackage: " & LandscapeFileOnServerPackage NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "LandscapeFileOnServerInput: " & LandscapeFileOnServerInput NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "strRegValue: " & strRegValue NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "LandscapeFileOnServerRegistry: " & LandscapeFileOnServerRegistry If (Not LCase(LandscapeFileOnServerPackage) = "none" AND Not LCase(LandscapeFileOnServerPackage) = "") Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Condition: Case 1" LandscapeFileOnServerInput = LandscapeFileOnServerPackage NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapGui.LandscapeFileOnServer.Internal", LandscapeFileOnServerInput Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Condition: Case 2" NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "LandscapeFileOnServerRegistry: " & LandscapeFileOnServerRegistry If Not LandscapeFileOnServerRegistry = "" Then LandscapeFileOnServerInput = LandscapeFileOnServerRegistry NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapGui.LandscapeFileOnServer.Internal", LandscapeFileOnServerInput End If End If NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: User input for SapGui.LandscapeFileOnServer is: " & LandscapeFileOnServerInput LandscapeFileOnServerInputLC = LCase(LandscapeFileOnServerInput) strRegValue = "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon\Options\LandscapeFileOnServer" If LandscapeFileOnServerInputLC = "none" OR LandscapeFileOnServerInputLC = "" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Removing registry value " & strRegValue & " if it exists because SapGui.LandscapeFileOnServer is set to NONE or empty." If NwEngine.Shell.RegValueExist(strRegValue) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Registry value " & strRegValue & " exist, deleting..." If NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegValue(strRegValue) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Successfully deleted registry value " & strRegValue & "." Else NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteError "Variable-Script-Action: Could not delete registry value " & strRegValue & "." End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Registry value " & strRegValue & " doesn't exist, skipping..." End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: SapGui.ConfigFileOnServer is not NONE. The key should not be deleted. Writing user input to the registry..." If NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue(strRegValue, "REG_EXPAND_SZ", LandscapeFileOnServerInput) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Registry value " & strRegValue & " set successfully to " & LandscapeFileOnServerInput & "." Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Failed to set registry value " & strRegValue & " to " & LandscapeFileOnServerInput & "." End If End If

Sub includeFile(fSpec) With CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject") executeGlobal .openTextFile(fSpec).readAll() End With End Sub
strFile = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%SAPSetupDir%\Setup\SapGUINWBCScripting.inc")
includeFile(strFile) ExecuteGUINWBCIntegration
